headline: Lululemon Gets a Lower Price Target. What It Means for the Stock.
summary: Lululemon Athletica’s  one-year stock chart looks redder than the face of someone who’s just been told they’re wearing a pair of the yoga company’s see-through leggings.  It’s true that Lululemon still has a strong cash position and China bucked the trend to show strong growth.
